4. We also know that Food:raspberry and Beverage:soy-milk have the same parity positions. Since blueberry is not raspberry or soy-milk, it cannot be in the position of raspberry or soy-milk.

6. We know that Sport:soccer is somewhere to the left of Music-Genre:country and Sport:soccer is not to the left of Sport:skateboarding. Since blueberry is to the right of Transport:ship, it cannot be in the position of Sport:soccer or Music-Genre:country.
7. We also know that Sport:soccer == Job:photographer or Sport:soccer == Music-Genre:dubstep, but not both. Since blueberry is not in the position of Sport:soccer or Music-Genre:dubstep, it cannot be in the position of Job:photographer or Music-Genre:dubstep.
8. We know that Food:asparagus is not to the left of Food:raspberry and Food:raspberry == Sport:skateboarding or Sport:skateboarding == Beverage:soy-milk, but not both. Since blueberry is not raspberry or soy-milk, it cannot be in the position of Sport:skateboarding or Beverage:soy-milk.
9. We know that Beverage:mirinda is somewhere between Sport:badminton and Beverage:juice and Beverage:mirinda is somewhere to the left of Sport:rugby. Since blueberry is not in the position of Beverage:mirinda or Sport:rugby, it cannot be in the position of Sport:badminton or Beverage:juice.
10. We know that Music-Genre:dubstep is not to the right of Music-Genre:salsa. Since blueberry is not in the position of Music-Genre:dubstep or Music-Genre:salsa, it cannot be in the position of Music-Genre:dubstep or Music-Genre:salsa.
11. We know that Job:police-officer != Transport:quad-bike and Job:police-officer == Food:watermelon or Job:police-officer == Transport:quad-bike, but not both. Since blueberry is not in the position of Job:police-officer or Transport:quad-bike, it cannot be in the position of Food:watermelon or Transport:quad-bike.
12. We know that Beverage:soy-milk is in an even position. Since blueberry is not in the position of Beverage:soy-milk, it cannot be in an even position.

Based on the above deductions, we can conclude that blueberry cannot be in the position of any of the given attributes. Therefore, the question is invalid as there is no person with the attribute "blueberry" in the line.
